name: Yentl Tab Listener
summary: Listen to tab audio and read Yentl's fact-checking analysis beside the source.

screenshots.caption: Yentl attaches to a media page and keeps the analysis beside the source.

permission_rationale.activeTab: Required so Yentl can start only from the tab the user explicitly chooses.
permission_rationale.offscreen: Required to process captured tab audio while the extension service worker stays MV3-compliant.
permission_rationale.scripting: Required to inject the same-page Yentl panel after the user starts capture.
permission_rationale.storage: Required to remember the selected Yentl app origin and capture preferences.
permission_rationale.tabCapture: Required to capture audio from the active tab after a user gesture.
permission_rationale.tabs: Required to verify the active tab, recover when the user switches tabs, and keep capture tied to the source.
permission_rationale.https://yentl.it/*: Required to load the production Yentl session panel and send source context to the app.
permission_rationale.https://api.deepgram.com/*: Required to stream captured audio for transcription.
permission_rationale.wss://api.deepgram.com: Required for the live transcription websocket.

data_use_disclosure: Captured tab audio is processed only after the user starts capture.
Transcript text is forwarded into the Yentl session for analysis.
The extension does not use the user's normal Chrome profile during automated local proof runs.
